LAW AND MOTION 301, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CHILDREN'S HOSPITAL & RESEARCH CENTER AT OAKLAND'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO CARRY ITS BURDEN AT LEAST WITH RESPECT TO ESTABLISHING THE INVOICES DATED AFTER THE SERVICE DATE MUST BE REIMBURSED. THE COURT ORDERED MS. FEINER TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH THE PROVISION OF CCP 437C)G. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
